settings.title: Restraint
settings.text: We remove rather than add. Every line, weight, and finish is earned. Nothing decorates for its own sake.

settings.title: Wearability
settings.text: Beautiful jewelry you never take off. Every piece is wear-tested for comfort across real daily life.

settings.title: Responsibility
settings.text: Recycled metals. Conflict-free stones. A small atelier with fair wages. This is our baseline, not our marketing.

settings.story_title: Built for the way you actually live.
